title: Frontend: Guided Abstention Card
description: Create AbstentionCard component for guided abstention responses. Shows Chinese message + query reformulation suggestions + clickable example questions.
acceptance_criteria: New AbstentionCard component renders for mode=no_context and mode=evidence_gate_abstain
Template A (insufficient evidence): Chinese message + reformulation suggestions
Template C (no documents): Chinese message + example questions
Abstention card does NOT show error/warning styling
Clicking suggestion/question submits it as new query
Both no_context and evidence_gate_abstain use same visual style
implementation_steps: 1. Create AbstentionCard.tsx with Template A and C support
2. Add Chinese abstention messages as constants
3. Add suggested questions from existing suggestedQuestions config
4. Add click handler to submit suggestion as new query
5. Integrate AbstentionCard into ChatPanel.tsx response rendering
6. Ensure abstention mode detection: mode === 'no_context' || mode === 'evidence_gate_abstain'
